name: vscode-extension-claude-code-ai-tracker
displayName: Claude Code AI cost / usage tracker
description: Capture and track Claude Code AI usage costs across projects and branches. Access the data easily in VSCode sidebar.

commands.title: Claude Code: Import Historical Data from Cache
Claude Code: Print Report to Console
Claude Code: Edit Daily Alert Threshold
Claude Code: Edit Weekly Alert Threshold
Claude Code: Edit Developer Hourly Rate
Claude Code: Edit Developer Hours Per Week

aiUsageCost.claudePath.description: Path to the Claude Code CLI binary

aiUsageCost.statsCachePath.description: Path to Claude Code stats-cache.json file for importing historical data. Use ~ for home directory.

aiUsageCost.weekStartDay.description: First day of the week for weekly breakdown view

aiUsageCost.dailyAlertThreshold.description: Daily cost alert threshold in dollars. Set to 0 to disable alerts. Example: 10 will alert when daily cost exceeds $10.

aiUsageCost.weeklyAlertThreshold.description: Weekly cost alert threshold in dollars. Set to 0 to disable alerts. Example: 50 will alert when weekly cost exceeds $50.

aiUsageCost.pollIntervalMinutes.description: Interval in minutes to automatically poll and refresh cost data. Set to 0 to disable auto-polling.

aiUsageCost.showInsightsAnalysis.description: Enable the Impact Analysis panel. Shows time saved, success rates, and ROI metrics generated from the /insights slash command in Claude Code. Data is read from ~/.claude/usage-data/facets/.

aiUsageCost.developerHourlyRate.description: Developer hourly rate in your local currency, used to calculate estimated developer value saved in the Impact Analysis panel.

aiUsageCost.developerHoursPerWeek.description: Contracted developer hours per week, used to calculate % time saved in the Impact Analysis panel.

enumDescriptions: Pay-per-token API billing: costs are calculated at standard Anthropic rates.
Claude Max subscription: cost figures shown are API-rate estimates only — not what you are actually charged.
aiUsageCost.billingType.description: Your Claude Code billing type. Controls how cost figures are labelled throughout the extension.

aiUsageCost.customModelPricing.description: Override pricing for specific models (USD per 1M tokens). Keys are model name substrings (e.g. "haiku", "sonnet", "claude-opus-4-6"). Each value must be an object with any of: inputPerMillion, outputPerMillion, cacheReadPerMillion, cacheWritePerMillion. Example: { "haiku": { "inputPerMillion": 0.8, "outputPerMillion": 4 } }

scripts.build-install: npm run compile && rm -rf install/*.vsix && npm run package && cp *.vsix install/ && rm -rf *.vsix
